title: Runtime Input
description: Per-run input to the daily-reporting skill. Machine-readable mirror of references/schemas/runtime-input-schema.md. See ./MAINTAINING.md for sync discipline.
$comment: Runtime input should stay small. The skill uses saved deployment_config first, then applies one-run changes declared here. Only 'mode' is required.

mode.description: Which reporting cycle this run produces.
mode.$comment: Mode-check failure paths (enforced at skills/daily-reporting/SKILL.md Workflow step 2): missing/empty mode -> status: blocked with a validation_meta.warnings entry. Mode not in deployment_config.enabled_modes -> status: blocked. The skill must not silently default or substitute.

report_date.description: Optional ISO-8601 calendar date override (YYYY-MM-DD). When absent, resolved from current runtime time using the saved timezone.
report_date.$comment: Constraints (see runtime-input-schema.md 'report_date constraints'): must not be later than the current local date unless allow_future_report_date is configured; must not overwrite an existing locked report for (mode, report_date, deployment) without an explicit override; a non-monotonic date surfaces a validation_meta.warnings entry. See ../policies/continuity-model.md 'Report date monotonicity' for the canonical rule.

timezone.description: Optional one-run IANA timezone override for report_date computation.
timezone.$comment: Takes precedence over deployment_config.defaults.timezone for this run. The output SHOULD record both the saved timezone and the effective-at-runtime timezone so continuity across timezone shifts is traceable. See runtime-input-schema.md 'Timezone edge cases'.

participants.description: Optional one-run participants override. Uses the canonical participant shape declared in deployment-config-schema.md.
participants.$comment: Canonical shape declared in deployment-config-schema.md 'Participants (canonical shape)'. Inlined here (as #/$defs/participant) to keep each JSON Schema file self-contained for validators that do not resolve cross-file $ref.

source_overrides.description: Optional per-source override of how a source is used for the current run only.
source_overrides.$comment: Keyed by the six canonical source keys: calendar, email, tasks, meetings, prior_state, manual. Each entry may declare enabled, retrieval_window, use_manual_fallback, replace_with_manual. Blank or omitted fields must not erase unrelated connected-source results.

operator_notes.description: Ordered list of short human notes for the current run.

confirmed_priorities.description: Ordered list of explicitly human-confirmed priorities.
confirmed_priorities.$comment: These enter merged_context.priorities at the top of the canonical ladder (see normalized-context-schema.md 'Merge rules').

manual_overrides.description: Targeted manual override object for fields the human wants to set directly.
manual_overrides.$comment: Shape is defined canonically in normalized-context-schema.md §manual (recommended manual_overrides shape: priorities[], carryovers[], blockers[], dependencies[], risks[], notes_for_this_cycle[]). Overrides apply only to fields explicitly named in the payload; other fields are untouched.

allow_future_report_date.description: When true, a report_date later than the current local date is permitted.
allow_future_report_date.$comment: Deployment-configured override flag referenced in 'report_date constraints' ('Future dates').

allow_overwrite_locked_report.description: When true, re-running over an existing locked (mode, report_date, deployment) tuple is permitted.
allow_overwrite_locked_report.$comment: Deployment-configured override flag referenced in 'report_date constraints' ('Existing lock (overwrite)'). Without this flag, a silent overwrite under auto_locked is forbidden.

owner_type.description: Role identifier vocabulary. Canonical declaration lives in deployment-config-schema.md.

participant.description: Canonical participant shape mirror. Source-of-truth is deployment-config-schema.md.

retrieval_window.$comment: Canonical vocabulary lives in deployment-config-schema.md 'Retrieval windows'.

source_override_tasks.$comment: tasks overrides must not widen into a whole-team audit (see runtime-input-schema.md 'Rules').
